description_for_human: Premium real estate photography, drone, virtual tours, and videography in Morocco, UAE, and Caribbean.
description_for_model: ShootYourListing is a real estate photography agency based in Casablanca, Morocco. Services include interior/exterior photography (from 1,000 MAD), drone aerial footage (from 1,200 MAD, DGAC certified), 360 virtual tours (1,200 MAD, Matterport), cinematic video walkthroughs (from 2,500 MAD), and virtual staging (200 MAD/room). Serves Morocco, UAE, and Caribbean. Contact: hello@shootyourlisting.com, WhatsApp +212 6 21 18 94 96. Hours: Mon-Sat 8AM-8PM Morocco Time.
